query:
ALTER TABLE game_monster_catalog
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS base_accuracy INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 80,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS base_magic_attack INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 8,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS resist_wood INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS resist_fire INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS resist_earth INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS resist_metal INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS resist_water INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS counter_bonus INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 50,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS skill_id_1 VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS skill_id_2 VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS skill_id_3 VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ai_level INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS growth_rate FLOAT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1.0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS drop_item_1 VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS drop_rate_1 FLOAT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS drop_item_2 VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS drop_rate_2 FLOAT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS drop_item_3 VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS drop_rate_3 FLOAT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS drop_item_4 VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS drop_rate_4 FLOAT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS drop_item_5 VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS drop_rate_5 FLOAT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS drop_gold JSON DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS legendary_drop VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS legendary_drop_rate FLOAT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS destiny_clue TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS spawn_nodes JSON DEFAULT NULL;
command:
